title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1869.  Rules and regulations

The department shall adopt rules and regulations to implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act, R.S. 49:950 et seq.  

Acts 1987, No. 324, §1, eff. July 6, 1987.
doc_text:
§1869.  Rules and regulations
The department shall adopt rules and regulations to implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act, R.S. 49:950 et seq.
Acts 1987, No. 324, §1, eff. July 6, 1987.
